overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside the NCART train in Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The journey passes through elevated tracks, enclosed urban canyons, and dark tunnels while holographic advertisements and skyscrapers flash by.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track through neon commercial district

events.description: large Watson Whore billboard comes into view on the right side of the track

agents.ego_description: riding the elevated train through the neon-lit city center, observing the illuminated skyline

entered.detail: cluster of high-rise buildings covered in neon advertisements and holographic displays
tall red circular neon sign mounted on a building facade
large illuminated advertisement with pink text reading WATSON WHORE and slogan BLOWING AWAY THE COMPETITION

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a sweeping view of Night City's neon-drenched skyline from an elevated train. Bright holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers dominate the view as the train moves forward. The Watson Whore billboard becomes prominently visible on the right, marking the first notable landmark of the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed train corridor between high-rise buildings

events.description: train enters enclosed structure between buildings, sky disappears from view
health clinic sign becomes visible on the left building wall

agents.ego_description: traveling through the narrow urban canyon between concrete buildings, passing close to walls and support structures

entered.detail: close-up view of dark concrete building facade passing by the train window
illuminated sign with text HEALTH visible on the building exterior
red painted metal support beams between building sections

segments.scene_description: The train enters a narrow enclosed passage between towering buildings, transitioning from the open neon skyline to a darker, confined urban canyon. Concrete walls pass by closely on both sides, with occasional signage like the health clinic marker visible. The lighting shifts from bright neon to dimmer, more industrial tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ellison Plaza station approach with holographic advertisements

events.description: train slows down significantly approaching Ellison Plaza station
automated station announcement for Ellison Plaza plays

agents.ego_description: slowing to a stop at Ellison Plaza station, observing the building with large holographic displays

entered.detail: multi-story concrete building with horizontal window slits and large holographic displays
large glowing holographic billboard showing a face on the upper floors of the building

segments.scene_description: The train decelerates as it approaches Ellison Plaza station, revealing a concrete building facade with prominent holographic advertisements. The movement slows to a crawl, allowing a clear view of the illuminated holographic face display on the building's exterior. The environment transitions from the narrow corridor to a more open station area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated track with open city skyline view

events.description: train accelerates away from Ellison Plaza station
automated announcement for next stop Sorrento and Republic plays

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the city with expansive views of the downtown skyline and distant towers

entered.detail: panoramic view of distant skyscrapers with various neon signs and holographic billboards
elevated highway structure curving through the cityscape below the train tracks

segments.scene_description: Leaving Ellison Plaza behind, the train accelerates into an open-air section with sweeping views of the distant city skyline. The camera captures the curved highway ramps and numerous illuminated towers in the background. The speed increases as the train travels through this exposed elevated section.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underground tunnel approaching Sorrento and Republic station

events.description: train enters dark underground tunnel, visibility drops significantly
arrival announcement for Sorrento and Republic station plays in the darkness
train comes to a complete stop in the dark station

agents.ego_description: entering the pitch-black tunnel and arriving at the underground Sorrento and Republic station

entered.detail: smooth dark concrete walls of the underground tunnel passing by the train windows
station wall featuring horizontal ventilation grates and dim emergency lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins as the train plunges into a dark underground tunnel, transitioning from the bright city views to near-total darkness. The train slows to a stop at Sorrento and Republic station, where only dim emergency lights and ventilation grates are visible on the concrete walls. The journey ends in this enclosed, shadowy underground environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the vibrant, neon-drenched heights of the city skyline down into the oppressive darkness of an underground station. It begins with a sweeping view of towering skyscrapers and bright holographic advertisements, including the prominent Watson Whore billboard, before the train glides into a narrow, dim urban canyon of concrete walls and industrial signage. As the train decelerates toward Ellison Plaza, the confined corridor opens up to reveal a building facade dominated by a glowing holographic face, only to accelerate again into an exposed elevated section with views of curved highway ramps and distant illuminated towers. The scene then shifts abruptly as the train plunges from the open air into a dark underground tunnel, where the bright city lights vanish. Finally, the movement slows to a stop at Sorrento and Republic station, ending in a shadowy environment lit only by dim emergency lights and concrete ventilation grates.
